file_summary: This file defines the RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) engine for searching and retrieving symbol information from a codebase.

symbols.name: refs
symbols.summary: A list of references to store symbols.

symbols.name: similar
symbols.summary: A list of similar symbols based on semantic embeddings.

symbols.name: allUsages
symbols.summary: A list of all usages of a symbol across the project.

symbols.name: fileText
symbols.summary: Constructs a string representing the file and its summary for embedding.

symbols.name: fileEmbed
symbols.summary: Generates an embedding for the file text using the LLM client.

symbols.name: text
symbols.summary: Constructs a string representation of a symbol for embedding.

symbols.name: symEmbed
symbols.summary: Generates an embedding for the symbol text using the LLM client.

symbols.name: embedding
symbols.summary: Generates an embedding for the query text using the LLM client.

symbols.name: hits
symbols.summary: Searches the vector store for top K similar embeddings.

symbols.name: results
symbols.summary: Initializes a slice to store lookup results.

symbols.name: sim
symbols.summary: Builds a list of similar symbols based on the given symbol.

symbols.name: result
symbols.summary: Hydrates a lookup result with detailed information.

symbols.name: fs
symbols.summary: Reads the summary of a file from the project root.

symbols.name: typeA
symbols.summary: Finds symbols by name in the vector store.

symbols.name: typeB
symbols.summary: Finds referencers of a symbol in the vector store.

symbols.name: seen
symbols.summary: A map to track seen usage keys to avoid duplicates.

symbols.name: addUsage
symbols.summary: A function to add a usage entry if it hasn't been seen before.

symbols.name: usage
symbols.summary: Creates a new usage entry with file, symbol name, kind, and start line.

symbols.name: ufs
symbols.summary: Reads the summary of a file for a search result.

symbols.name: LookupResult
symbols.summary: Represents the result of a lookup query, including symbol details and usages.

symbols.name: Usage
symbols.summary: Represents a usage entry for a symbol, including file, name, kind, and context.

symbols.name: SimilarSymbol
symbols.summary: Represents a similar symbol with its details and distance from the original.

symbols.name: Engine
symbols.summary: The main engine struct that holds the LLM client, vector store, and project root.

symbols.name: New
symbols.summary: Creates a new Engine instance with the given LLM client, vector store, and project root.

symbols.name: buildSymbolText
symbols.summary: Builds a textual representation of a symbol summary for embedding.
